name: Champagne Speaker - heyday™ Gold
description:
Bring party vibes with the Champagne Speaker - heyday™ Gold. This compact yet powerful speaker blends fun style with the latest Bluetooth connectivity for seamless wireless streaming. With a battery that offers up to 1.5 hours of playtime, it's perfect for music on the go. The USB-C connection ensures fast and efficient charging, so you’re always ready to hit play. Whether you're hosting a get-together or just chilling solo, this speaker delivers rich, sound with convenience.

Heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
